steps.title: Identify the y-intercept
steps.content: The point $(0, 27)$ lies on the $y$-axis, telling us the $y$-intercept is $b = 27$.

steps.title: Use slope-intercept form to write the equation
steps.content:
The slope-intercept form is $y = mx + b$. With slope $m = 5$ and $y$-intercept $b = 27$:
$$f(x) = 5x + 27$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
